> Marketing residual tier from `coreyhaines31/marketingskills`. These six slugs are not named in the existing curated marketing row; `schema` covers structured-data work distinct from local `seo-audit`.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add coreyhaines31/marketingskills --skill ai-seo --skill schema --skill product-marketing --skill ab-testing --skill signup --skill onboarding -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/product-marketing`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/product-marketing.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add coreyhaines31/marketingskills --skill ai-seo --skill schema --skill product-marketing --skill ab-testing --skill signup --skill onboarding -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Marketing residual tier from `coreyhaines31/marketingskills`. These six slugs are not named in the existing curated marketing row; `schema` covers structured-data work distinct from local `seo-audit`.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Foundation skill read by most others. Establishes product positioning, audience, messaging house, and context document used across the bundle.

## Install Prerequisites

npx skills add coreyhaines31/marketingskills --skill product-marketing -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode

The bundle installs many related skills; install only the needed subset when possible. Requires a product-marketing.md context file for best results.

## Upstream Maintainer

coreyhaines31 (https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills). Companion resources: Coding for Marketers, Swipe Files, Conversion Factory.

## Comparable Alternatives

Framework or channel-specific guides (Google Ads docs, Klaviyo/Mailchimp playbooks, traditional CRO resources, competitor tools such as Ahrefs/Semrush skills when available). Local playbooks and analytics-driven experimentation replace generic advice over time.

&gt; Evidence gathered from public GitHub (repo README, skills/ sources, AGENTS.md). Not an endorsement or authority; marketing tactics must be validated against current platform policies, data, and legal requirements.
